title: LV Prasad Eye Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: LV Prasad Eye Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!
